metadata.description: ETYS 2024 boundary transfer capabilities and flow statistics
metadata.source: NESO ETYS 2024 Boundary Chart Data (exact values from published xlsx)
notes: Capability = maximum secure power transfer (MW) across boundary under NETS SQSS
Includes stability, voltage, and contingency margins - NOT just thermal rating
5pc/25pc/75pc/95pc = percentile flow expectations from FES dispatch modelling
Economy RT = Economy Required Transfer (SQSS planning criterion)
Security RT = Security Required Transfer (SQSS planning criterion)
Values in MW. Positive = north-to-south or export direction.
Capability varies by year due to planned reinforcements.
F suffix (e.g. B6F) indicates forward/export direction capability.
I suffix (e.g. EC5I) indicates import direction capability.
